sections: header: char[8] magic; u32 version, polyRefBytes, yawBits, vertexCount, polygonCount, indexCount, neighborCount; f32 yawStepRad, cellSize
polygons: polygonCount * u64 ref; u32 firstVert, vertCount, firstNeighbor, neighborCount, mask; u16 area, flags; i32 tile, tilePoly; f32 centerX, centerY, centerZ
neighbors: neighborCount * u32 poly; u64 ref; u32 edge; f32 portalAx, portalAy, portalAz, portalBx, portalBy, portalBz
